talent_affixes.name: Subtlety
talent_affixes.notes: Reduces threat from Restoration spells by 4%/rank. All-ones used — Restoration spells are not addressable as a sub-type via Druid family SpellMod; acceptable scope for Restoration spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Nature's Focus (3r, tier 2) — Reduces pushback chance while channeling healing spells. Pushback resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Regrowth
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[64,0,0]=0x00000040 (mask0 bit6). No shared Druid marker bits. Regrowth crit chance +10%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 1000=10%).

Improved Tranquility (2r, tier 3) — Reduces cooldown of Tranquility by 50/100% and reduces threat. Cooldown reduction on Tranquility(740) could work once flags verified. Deferring.
Gift of Nature (5r, tier 4) — Increases healing done by your healing spells by 2%/rank. Could be all-ones DAMAGE PCT (if DAMAGE covers healing in AzerothCore SpellMod). Deferring — verify in-game.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Rejuvenation
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16,0,0]=0x00000010 (mask0 bit4). Same carrier/flags as id=92. HoT healing +2%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Living Spirit (3r, tier 5) — Increases total Spirit by 5/10/15%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Barkskin (2r, tier 5) — Reduces physical damage while Barkskin is active. Conditional mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Swiftmend (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Natural Perfection (3r, tier 6) — Your crits have a chance to grant 1/2/3% physical damage mitigation. Proc-based mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.

Empowered Touch (2r, tier 7) — Increases spell power bonus of Healing Touch and Nourish by 10/20%. DAMAGE PCT on HT[32,0,0]|Nourish[0,33554432,0] → flags=[32,33554432,0]. Deferring — add as separate entry once ready.
Improved Lifebloom (3r, tier 8) — Increases healing done by Lifebloom by 5/10/15%. DAMAGE PCT on Lifebloom(33763) — flags not yet verified. Run .spellinfo all 33763 when ready.

Gift of the Earthmother (5r, tier 9) — Increases your spell haste by 2%/rank AND Rejuvenation instantly heals on application. Haste is passive stat; instant heal is a proc on cast; not implementable as SpellMod.
Tree of Life (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
